title: Rainbow Designs Christmas Snowman Toy - Super Soft Musical Plush with Green Hat & Scarf, plays 'We're Walking in the Air', 19d x 14.5w x 20.5h
features: CUDDLE UP WITH THE SNOWMAN: The Snowman is loved by everyone, from babies to grandparents, and now you can cuddle up with your very own super soft Musical Snowman Toy from Rainbow Designs. Created from the softest, quality plush fabrics and all wrapped up in hat and scarf, this soft and cuddly Musical Snowman toy makes a wonderful Christmas gift for any baby, child or nostalgic fan of this much-loved character.

MAGICAL CHRISTMAS DREAMS: Teddy bears and plush soft toys can help your baby to feel safe and secure, especially at bedtime, and the Snowman soft toy, that is suitable from birth, is perfect for babies and young children to snuggle up with for those Christmas-time sleeps. Gently squeeze his tummy, and this super soft Snowman musical toy plays the gentle lullaby ‘We’re Walking in the Air’, helping to soothe and comfort, sending little ones off to sleep with magical Christmas dreams!

WE’RE WALKING IN THE AIR: Musical toys, night lights and mobiles are useful aids to help to calm baby and help create good bedtime routines, encouraging babies to self soothe and create good sleep patterns. The Snowman’s iconic musical score, ‘We’re Walking in the Air’, that was originally sung by Aled Jones, plays as a gentle melody in this adorable Snowman Musical Toy and as a beautiful reminder for all, that Christmas is here!

A FESTIVE KEEPSAKE: The Snowman gifts make wonderful festive keepsake, that can be saved to return each Christmas, just like The Snowman, or treasured all year round! The Snowman musical toy makes a heartfelt Christmas gift for baby through to adult. As well as being the perfect bedtime companion for little ones, The Snowman teddy also makes the great plush friend to share story time or movie time with, especially when it is Raymond Briggs' classic tale, The Snowman!
description: Product Description SNOWMAN MUSICAL TOY For many children, parents and grandparents, Raymond Briggs’ The Snowman is synonymous with Christmas, and to celebrate this festive time of year Rainbow Designs have created a super soft and cuddly Snowman musical toy. Written over 40 years ago, this is the animated story of a little boy’s Christmas adventure with a magical Snowman that comes to life. The Snowman has appeared on our TV screens every Christmas for 40 years, capturing the hearts of millions. Created from the highest quality plush fabrics and wrapped up snuggly in his hat and scarf, this adorable Musical Snowman toy makes a magical Christmas gift for any child or nostalgic fan, and a wonderful décor piece for any home at Christmas. Perfect to snuggle up with for those Christmas time sleeps, this Snowman soft toy plays the lullaby ‘We’re Walking in the Air’, to encourage those magical Christmas dreams! Suitable from birth, the Snowman soft toy helps to bring the magic of the Christmas story and the wonderful film to life for the youngest of children, and makes the ultimate cuddly book buddy when reading Raymond Briggs' classic tale, The Snowman, or as a movie companion when enjoying the famous Christmas films; The Snowman and the sequel, The Snowman and The Snowdog. Rainbow Designs has been inspiring kids for over 50 years, treasuring heritage and wholesome values and embracing classic characters in their product designs. They combine prestigious, renowned brands with innovative design to create contemporary soft toys and gifts for babies and children. This helps bring classic characters to modern families, introducing new generations to the joy of characters and storybooks. Rainbow Designs really does have a soft toy for everyone, babies, parents and grandparents, with plenty of teddy bears, bunnies and even a Snowman to choose from! We have soft toys galore in our Paddington Bear, Peter Rabbit, The Very Hungry Caterpillar, Guess How Much I Love You, Elmer, Spot the Dog, Miffy, That’s Not My..., Snoopy, We’re Going on a Bear Hunt and The Snowman and The Snowdog ranges.
